name: @cairn/engine
description: Cairn / Mneme — headless local-first indexing & retrieval engine. Index a folder of Markdown and run grounded, cited hybrid (dense + FTS5 + RRF) search over it. No telemetry, no cloud; embeddings via local Ollama.

scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && node --test test/retrieval-gate.test.mjs test/index-search.test.mjs test/model-provider.test.mjs test/retrieve.test.mjs test/ask-coverage.test.mjs test/reindex-pipeline.test.mjs test/scope.test.mjs test/chat-thread.test.mjs test/wikilinks.test.mjs test/agent-run.test.mjs test/cloud-provider.test.mjs test/cli-index-guard.test.mjs
